title: [Bug] Contact sensor with luminance paired as mmWave radar (wrong driver match)
excerpt:
**Version:** v5.11.26
**Expected Driver:** contact_sensor or sensor_contact_luminance
**Actual Driver:** motion_sensor_radar_mmwave
**Severity:** High  device paired to completely wrong driver

## Problem
A contact sensor with luminance feature is being matched to motion_sensor_radar_mmwave instead of a contact sensor driver. The device has IAS Zone (contact open/close) + illuminance measurement clusters, but the pairing logic selects the mmWave radar driver.

## Diagnosis
Likely cause: the fingerprint (manufacturerName) is listed in motion_sensor_radar_mmwave but not in a contact sensor driver, OR the productId overlap causes wrong matching.

## Action Needed
- User needs to provide exact fingerprint (manufacturerName from device interview)
- Check which driver.compose.json files contain this fingerprint
- Move to correct contact sensor driver

**Diag Log ID:** 4937c244-8b0c-49fb-ab95-d7858270869e

diagComments.excerpt:
<!-- tuya-issue-manager -->
Hey @dlnraja,

Thanks for reporting this issue! I see the problem. I'll check the fingerprint and see why it's being matched to the wrong driver. I'll need the exact fingerprint (manufacturerName) from the device interview to proceed. Once I have that, I'll move the fingerprint to the correct contact sensor driver.

If you can provide the fingerprint and any additional details from the device interview, that would be super helpful!

Thanks for your patience.
